title: Set up iPlug2OOS repo and CMake build
description: Clone iPlug2OOS template, scaffold the RVRSE plugin project, configure CMakeLists.txt, create Constants.h and CHANGELOG.md. Verify empty plugin builds on macOS. Establish the src/ and resources/ directory structure per RVRSE_BRIEF.md.
close_reason: iPlug2OOS scaffold complete. All 4 formats (VST3, AU, CLAP, APP) build and deploy on macOS/arm64. CMake+Ninja pipeline working.

title: Implement OLA time-stretcher
description: Overlap-Add time-stretcher as a stateless function. stretchFactor = (riserLengthBeats * samplesPerBeat) / reversed_buffer.size(). Recalculate final_riser[] on Riser Length or BPM change. Quality is less critical than correctness for MVP. Offline pipeline only.
close_reason: OLA time-stretcher in TimeStretch.h: Hann-windowed overlap-add with 50% overlap, normalised output. calcStretchFactor() helper maps beats+BPM to stretch ratio. kOlaWindowSize=2048 in Constants.h. Compiles clean.

title: Add headless integration tests (ProcessBlock)
description: Create integration tests that instantiate the RVRSE plugin class directly (no GUI, no DAW), feed it MIDI events and silence buffers, and verify audio output. Includes: load a known WAV, trigger riser, compare output against golden-master reference. Uses Catch2 as the test runner.

title: Wire offline-to-real-time buffer handoff
description: Lock-free transfer of final_riser[] from RvrseProcessor (background thread) to RvrseVoice (audio thread). Use an atomic flag or double-buffer swap. No allocations or locks on the audio thread.
close_reason: RvrseProcessor wired into RVRSE class. Sample loads trigger offline pipeline. ProcessBlock polls isNewRiserReady() for lock-free riser consumption. OnReset propagates sample rate. mRiserBuffer available for audio-thread playback.

title: Validate on macOS (Cubase + Studio One + Logic)
description: Manual QA on macOS: load sample, trigger via MIDI, tweak Stutter CC, verify timing accuracy, test all parameter ranges. Test in Cubase, Studio One, and Logic. Verify VST3, AU, and CLAP formats.

title: Implement WaveformView control
description: IControl subclass showing the complete riser→hit sequence as one continuous waveform. Reversed/washed riser on the left, sharp hit transient on the right. Playhead scrubs during playback for live visual feedback. Updates when final_riser[] is rebuilt.

title: Validate on Windows (Cubase + Studio One)
description: Manual QA on Windows: load sample, trigger via MIDI, tweak Stutter CC, verify timing accuracy, test all parameter ranges. Test in both Cubase and Studio One. Verify VST3 and CLAP formats.

title: Implement offline pipeline orchestrator (RvrseProcessor)
description: Chains: load → reverb → reverse → stretch. Runs on a background thread, never on audio thread. On offline parameter change, rebuild from the appropriate stage onwards (e.g. Lush change re-runs everything; Riser Length change only re-stretches). Writes result into final_riser[].
close_reason: RvrseProcessor.h: full offline pipeline orchestrator. Chains reverb→reverse→stretch on background thread. Generation-based abort for stale builds. Caches reversed buffer to skip reverb on stretch-only changes. Lock-free output handoff via atomic shared_ptr. Compiles clean.

title: Implement Schroeder algorithmic reverb
description: Implement a Schroeder/Moorer-style algorithmic reverb as a stateless function: applyReverb(in, out, numSamples, lushAmount). Parallel comb filters feeding series allpass filters. Lush knob maps to room size + wet gain. No external libraries. Must run in offline pipeline only (never on audio thread).
close_reason: Schroeder/Moorer reverb implemented in Reverb.h: 8 parallel combs + 4 series allpasses with LP damping. Stereo version uses independent engines per channel. Lush knob maps to room size + wet gain. All constants in Constants.h. Compiles clean, 0 warnings.

title: Add Catch2 test framework and tests/ directory
description: Add Catch2 via CMake FetchContent. Create tests/ directory with CMakeLists.txt. Add a placeholder test that compiles and runs. Wire into cmake --build build --target test. This is the foundation for DSP unit tests in Phase 2.

title: Implement MIDI CC for Stutter Rate + Depth
description: Wire MIDI CC1 (mod wheel) to Stutter Rate and CC11 (expression) to Stutter Depth. Hardcoded defaults per Constants.h. CC changes update parameters instantly (per-sample). Future: user-assignable CC (out of scope for MVP).

title: Write initial README.md
description: Create a concise but complete README covering: project description, build prerequisites, build instructions (macOS + Windows), plugin formats produced, and basic usage. Keep it lean — update incrementally as features land.
close_reason: README.md created at project root with: project description, architecture overview (two-layer split, file map, data flow diagrams), sample loading flow, offline pipeline stages, real-time playback loop, build instructions (macOS + Windows), plugin formats, DAW usage, project structure. RVRSE/README.md updated to point to root.

title: Implement Riser Tune + Hit Tune (pitch shift)
description: Linear resampling for pitch shifting. Riser Tune (-24 to +24 st) applied during riser playback. Hit Tune (-24 to +24 st) applied during hit playback. Simple playback rate change — no FFT or granular synthesis needed for MVP. Riser Tune responds to CC2.

title: Implement buffer reversal
description: In-place reverse of the lushed (reverbed) buffer. Simple std::reverse or manual swap. Part of the offline pipeline — never called from audio thread.
close_reason: In-place stereo buffer reversal in BufferUtils.h — std::reverse on deinterleaved L/R vectors. Offline pipeline only. Compiles clean.

title: Implement riser + hit playback (RvrseVoice)
description: Real-time voice that plays final_riser[] from the start, fires the dry hit at the calculated beat offset (Riser Length * samplesPerBeat), and applies a fade envelope. Reads from pre-computed buffers only — no allocations on the audio thread. MIDI note-on starts riser, both voices release naturally.
close_reason: Riser + hit dual-voice playback working. Riser plays on note-on, dry hit fires at beat offset. Sample rate resampling for 96kHz+ files. BPM sync via GetTempo(). Tail fade-out (kRiserTailFadeBeats). Note-off re-trigger bug fixed. Tested in DAW.

title: Build full IGraphics GUI (dark theme)
description: Build the complete GUI per RVRSE_BRIEF.md layout: three zones (riser panel, hit panel, bottom bar). Dark themed. IKnobControl for all parameters with labels. MIDI CC indicator (◉) on stutter knobs. Load Sample button. BPM display. Master Volume + Dry/Wet knobs in bottom bar.

title: Implement sample loading with dr_libs
description: Integrate dr_libs (header-only). Load WAV and AIFF files into a float32 stereo buffer. Provide a file-open mechanism (minimal GUI button or drag-drop). Store source_buffer[] and hit_buffer[] for later use by the offline pipeline and real-time voice.
close_reason: Sample loading implemented with dr_libs. WAV+AIFF via dr_wav.h. Load button + file dialog + background thread loading. All 4 formats build clean.

title: Set up GitHub Actions CI (Windows + macOS)
description: Create GitHub Actions workflows to auto-build VST3, AU, and CLAP artefacts on every push. Separate workflows for Windows and macOS. Verify CI passes with the empty plugin scaffold.

title: Implement real-time stutter gate (Stutter.h)
description: Per-sample rhythmic gate. stutterPeriod = samplesPerBeat / rateSubdivision. Gate computed as square wave with 50% duty cycle. Depth controls wet/dry mix of gate. Audio thread only — never called from offline pipeline. Must be MIDI CC responsive with zero latency (changes take effect on the next sample).

title: Add Pluginval to CI pipeline
description: Download pluginval and run it against RVRSE.vst3, RVRSE.clap, and RVRSE.component in the GitHub Actions CI workflow. Pluginval catches crashes, threading bugs, and parameter issues. Should be a hard gate — CI fails if pluginval fails.

title: Implement MIDI note-on sample playback
description: Simplest possible playback: MIDI note-on triggers the loaded hit sample. No riser, no effects. Just load a sample, press a MIDI key, hear the hit. This validates the full signal path (MIDI in → sample read → audio out) and provides a testable foundation for all subsequent features. Include a rudimentary GUI with a Load Sample button and basic plugin info.
close_reason: MIDI note-on triggers sample playback. Velocity scaling, sample-accurate timing, 5ms anti-click fade-out on note-off. Tested in standalone app — works cleanly.

title: Tag v0.1.0 and publish GitHub release
description: Create release/0.1.0 branch from develop, finalize CHANGELOG.md, merge to main, tag v0.1.0, attach built VST3/AU/CLAP artefacts from CI. Follow git-flow release process.

title: Set up C++ development environment (macOS)
description: Install Xcode command-line tools, CMake, and verify the C++17 compiler toolchain. Ensure all prerequisites for iPlug2 development are in place.
close_reason: C++ environment verified: Apple Clang 17.0 (C++17, arm64), CMake 4.2.3, Ninja 1.13.2, pkg-config installed. All tools confirmed working via test builds.
